[File: 'File Name: grpc/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/grpc/service/TopicMessageServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Reorganizing transaction history without direct theft of funds'] [Function: TopicContext.isComplete()] Can an unprivileged external user set endTime to a value that is exactly equal to startTime of the TopicContext (DomainUtils.now() at construction time), causing isComplete() to return true immediately (filter.getEndTime() < startTime), terminating the stream before any messages are delivered and making the topic appear to have no history?
